message:
feat(ffs-ondisk): btrfs logical-to-physical mapping via sys_chunk_array (bd-kdk)

Add map_logical_to_physical() which resolves a logical bytenr to a
physical (devid, offset) pair using parsed sys_chunk_array entries.
Single-device only (uses first stripe per chunk).

New type: BtrfsPhysicalMapping.  3 new tests covering hit, miss,
and empty-chunks cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
